text:
This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center unit count associated with accommodation 
revenue center code 021X from all claim records included in the stay. 

There is approximately a 20% error rate in the revenue center code category 0214 due to coders 
misunderstanding the term 'post CCU' as including any day after a CCU stay rather than just days in a 
step-down/lower case version of a CCU. 'Post' was removed from the revenue center code 0214 
description, effective 10/1/96
